title: Unsecured tool bag at perimeter - near miss
description: Tool bag left unsecured at Level 11 perimeter by ironworker during steel erection. Bag was noticed by safety officer during inspection before it fell. Worker counseled and retrained on housekeeping. Tethering requirement reinforced at toolbox talk.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: Minor laceration - sheet metal worker
description: Sheet metal worker sustained laceration to left forearm while cutting HVAC duct on Level 3. First aid applied on site. Worker continued on light duty. OSHA 300 log updated. Reviewed cutting PPE requirements with sheet metal crew.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: Struck-by - falling debris from masonry scaffolding
description: Small piece of mortar fell from masonry scaffold Level 5 and struck laborer below on head. Laborer was not wearing hard hat - he had removed it temporarily. No injury due to small size of debris. Worker received mandatory safety stand-down. Warning issued.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex
